<section class="module mod-multi-column  list-text" style="background-color: #f2f3f5">
    <div class="container">
                            <div class="row">
                                    <div class="col-sl-6 col-item">
                        <div class="col-text-box last-mb-none  style-ul animation ani-bottom item-delay">
                                                        <p>   <img loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="alignnone size-full wp-image-42100" src="https://rapidscale.net/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/Simplify_IT_icon.png" alt="" width="100" height="100" /></p>
<h5><span class="TextRun MacChromeBold SCXW45490063 BCX0" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW45490063 BCX0">Global Reach, World-Leading Engineering</span></span></h5>
<p><span class="TextRun SCXW86006518 BCX0" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW86006518 BCX0">Deploy anywhere your business goes, without the limitations of proprietary data centers. Know that </span><span class="NormalTextRun SpellingErrorV2Themed SCXW86006518 BCX0">RapidScale</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW86006518 BCX0"> is investing in </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW86006518 BCX0">deep engineering </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW86006518 BCX0">talent </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW86006518 BCX0">and business acumen </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW86006518 BCX0">to support your business </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW86006518 BCX0">objectives</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW86006518 BCX0"> as our top priority</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW86006518 BCX0">, at speed.</span></span><span class="EOP SCXW86006518 BCX0" data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}"> </span></p>
<p><a class="btn-link link-primary" href="https://rapidscale.net/about/why-rapidscale">Learn More</a></p>

                        </div>
                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-sl-6 col-item">
                        <div class="col-text-box last-mb-none  style-ul animation ani-bottom item-delay">
                                                        <p><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="alignnone size-full wp-image-42097" src="https://rapidscale.net/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/Cloud_Migration_icon.png" alt="" width="100" height="100" /></p>
<h5><span class="TextRun MacChromeBold SCXW31327991 BCX0" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW31327991 BCX0">Public Cloud Across the </span><span class="NormalTextRun SpellingErrorV2Themed SCXW31327991 BCX0">Hyperscaler</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW31327991 BCX0"> Trifecta</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW31327991 BCX0" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW31327991 BCX0"> </span></span></h5>
<p><span class="TextRun SCXW121481188 BCX0" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW121481188 BCX0">Single or multi-cloud, we have your business covered every way you need, now or in the future. </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW121481188 BCX0">Optimize</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW121481188 BCX0">, modernize, and scale, knowing the </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW121481188 BCX0">expertise</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW121481188 BCX0"> you need today—and tomorrow—are behind you.</span></span><span class="EOP SCXW121481188 BCX0" data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}"> </span></p>
<p><a class="btn-link link-primary" href="https://rapidscale.net/public-cloud/services-solutions/cloud-migration">Learn More</a></p>

                        </div>
                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-sl-6 col-item">
                        <div class="col-text-box last-mb-none  style-ul animation ani-bottom item-delay">
                                                        <p><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="alignnone size-full wp-image-42099" src="https://rapidscale.net/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/Security_compliance_icon.png" alt="" width="100" height="100" /></p>
<h5><span class="TextRun MacChromeBold SCXW241390245 BCX0" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW241390245 BCX0">Private Cloud Your Way</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW241390245 BCX0" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW241390245 BCX0"> </span></span><span class="EOP SCXW241390245 BCX0" data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}"> </span></h5>
<p><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW180798554 BCX0">As one of Broadcom VMware’s select few Elite partners, we provide hybrid-ready architecture, expanded, strategic </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW180798554 BCX0">expertise</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW180798554 BCX0"> and redundancy of talent, in multi-tenant or dedicated <span class="TextRun SCXW70138774 BCX0" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW70138774 BCX0">environments in one or more of our global facilities and/or on premises in your data center, across the VCF stack. </span></span></span></p>
<p><a class="btn-link link-primary" href="https://rapidscale.net/about/news/navigate-broadcom-vmwares-partner-program-changes-with-rapidscale">Learn More</a></p>

                        </div>
                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-sl-6 col-item">
                        <div class="col-text-box last-mb-none  style-ul animation ani-bottom item-delay">
                                                        <p><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="alignnone size-full wp-image-42098" src="https://rapidscale.net/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/Expert_icon.png" alt="" width="100" height="100" /></p>
<h5><span class="TextRun MacChromeBold SCXW177075063 BCX0" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW177075063 BCX0">Professional &amp; Advisory Services</span></span></h5>
<p><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW144091196 BCX0">Define </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW144091196 BCX0">what’s</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW144091196 BCX0"> next. </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW144091196 BCX0">From workload migration to app modernization, </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW144091196 BCX0">we’re</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW144091196 BCX0"> your strategic partner—not just your provider. And </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW144091196 BCX0">we’ll</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW144091196 BCX0"> continue looking around corners and beyond the horizon on your behalf, with <span class="TextRun SCXW223748757 BCX0" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW223748757 BCX0">comprehensive advisory services to advance your business to the next competitive growth phase. </span></span></span></p>
<p><a class="btn-link link-primary" href="https://rapidscale.net/public-cloud/expertise/application-modernization">Learn More</a></p>

                        </div>

<h4><span data-contrast="auto">No vaporware. No Fluff. </span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559739&quot;:0}"> <br />
</span><span data-contrast="auto">Real Clients. Real Stories. Real Results.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559739&quot;:0}"> </span></h4>
<p><span class="TextRun SCXW245573401 BCX0" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW245573401 BCX0">When a Christmas morning hacker breached 1</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW245573401 BCX0" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun Superscript SCXW245573401 BCX0" data-fontsize="12">st</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW245573401 BCX0" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW245573401 BCX0"> Lake Properties’ Citrix servers are began encrypting sensitive data, the leading property developer leaned on </span><span class="NormalTextRun SpellingErrorV2Themed SCXW245573401 BCX0">RapidScale’s</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW245573401 BCX0"> 24/7/365 cyber resiliency services to fully recover their data as if the breach never happened. </span></span><span class="EOP SCXW245573401 BCX0" data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559739&quot;:0}"> </span></p>
